titleStmt.title: SII 22.439: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 439. (A.R. No. 439 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE SAME WALL

summary.p: This is dated simply in the cyclic year Virōdhi which might probably correspond to Śaka 1271, as the writing is similar to that at No. 438 above. The inscription records the conferment of the post of uvachohakkāṇi in the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaram-Uḍaiyār at Tuṟavalūr by the authorities of the temple, on a certain Śellappiḷḷaiyāṉ who had been in the service of the temple of Vāṉava-Nayanār at Rājendraśōḻaṉ-pēṭṭai in Śūralūr-kūṟṟam a division of Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu on the south bank (of the river Kāvēri ?) in Śōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī caṇṭeśvaran Olai sāgaram cūḻ vaiyyakattu kaṇṭicaṉ karumam Ārāyka paṇṭe Aṟañceytān cey
tān Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pātam tiṟampāmal ceṉṉimel vaittu Aruḷāl Āticaṇṭeśva
raṉ virodhisamvatsarattu Āṉi mātam 10 4- n tiyatināḷ coḻamaṇṭa
lattu teṉkarai rājagambhiravaḷanāṭṭu cūralūṟ kūṟṟattu rājendraco
ḻappeṭṭaiyil Uṭaiyār vāṉavanāyaṉār koyilil Uvaccakkāṇi yāḷaril
Uṭaiyāṉ cellappiḷḷaiyāṉukku koṅkumaṇṭalattu Oṭuvakkānāṭṭu tuṟavalūrā
ṉa nilagirisādhāraṇaṉ koṭṭaiyil Uṭaiyār tāntoṉṟiśvara muṭaiyār ko
yilil Uvaccakkāṇiāṭci candrādittavaraiyum kāṇi Āṭci
yāka kuṭuttom Aruḷāl Āticaṇṭeśvara śrīkaraṇattāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.439 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
